name: USS Tolman (DM 28)
events: 13 Jan 1945 USS Tolman departed from Boston bound for the Pacific.
27 Jan 1945 USS Tolman arrived at San Diego.
23 Feb 1945 USS Tolman departed from Pearl Harbor bound for Ulithi.
19 Mar 1945 USS Tolman departed from Ulithi to participate in the Okinawa campaign.
19 Apr 1945 USS Tolman is grounded off Nagunna Reef.
25 Apr 1945 USS Tolman is towed of the reef. She was towed to Kerama Retto for repairs.
15 May 1945 USS Tolman enters dry-dock at Kerama Retto.
28 Jun 1945 USS Tolman departed from Kerama Retto bound for the United States.
21 Jul 1945 USS Tolman arrived at San Pedro for permanent repairs.
